mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_score_summary (document_id, user_id, first_evaluation_id, latest_evaluation_id, best_evaluation_id, first_overall_score, latest_overall_score, best_overall_score, latest_band_label, latest_word_count, latest_total_error_count, latest_major_error_count, latest_minor_error_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{firstEvaluationId}, #{latestEvaluationId}, #{bestEvaluationId}, #{firstOverallScore}, #{latestOverallScore}, #{bestOverallScore}, #{latestBandLabel}, #{latestWordCount}, #{latestTotalErrorCount}, #{latestMajorErrorCount}, #{latestMinorErrorCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE document_score_summary SET user_id = #{userId}, first_evaluation_id = #{firstEvaluationId}, latest_evaluation_id = #{latestEvaluationId}, best_evaluation_id = #{bestEvaluationId}, first_overall_score = #{firstOverallScore}, latest_overall_score = #{latestOverallScore}, best_overall_score = #{bestOverallScore}, latest_band_label = #{latestBandLabel}, latest_word_count = #{latestWordCount}, latest_total_error_count = #{latestTotalErrorCount}, latest_major_error_count = #{latestMajorErrorCount}, latest_minor_error_count = #{latestMinorErrorCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
mapper.select: SELECT document_id, user_id, first_evaluation_id, latest_evaluation_id, best_evaluation_id, first_overall_score, latest_overall_score, best_overall_score, latest_band_label, latest_word_count, latest_total_error_count, latest_major_error_count, latest_minor_error_count, created_at, updated_at FROM document_score_summary WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
